=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/redundantMapError_preview.ts(12,35): warning TS377088: This generator applies the same inline `Effect.mapError(...)` to every yielded effect. Keep that `Effect.mapError(...)` inline and hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.mapError(...))`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.mapError(...))`. effect(redundantMapError)


==== /.src/redundantMapError_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics redundantMapError:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    declare const first: Effect.Effect<number, unknown>
    declare const second: Effect.Effect<string, unknown>
    
    class RepoError {
      constructor(readonly args: { cause: unknown }) {}
    }
    
    export const program = Effect.gen(function*() {
                                      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377088: This generator applies the same inline `Effect.mapError(...)` to every yielded effect. Keep that `Effect.mapError(...)` inline and hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.mapError(...))`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.mapError(...))`. effect(redundantMapError)
!!! related TS377089 /.src/redundantMapError_preview.ts(14,5): This repeated `Effect.mapError(...)` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide mapping. effect(redundantMapError)
!!! related TS377089 /.src/redundantMapError_preview.ts(18,5): This repeated `Effect.mapError(...)` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide mapping. effect(redundantMapError)
      yield* first.pipe(
        Effect.mapError((cause) => new RepoError({ cause }))
      )
    
      return yield* second.pipe(
        Effect.mapError((cause) => new RepoError({ cause }))
      )
    })
